name: minimal-fix-with-regression-test
description: A disciplined bug-fix loop: reproduce, add a failing regression test, make the smallest fix, then run the full suite.

steps.instruction: Reproduce the failure and retain the exact failing output.
Add a focused regression test that fails before the implementation change.
Implement the smallest change that fixes the demonstrated failure.
Run the focused test and the complete available test suite.

rubric: The regression test failed before the implementation change
The final diff contains no unrelated refactor
The complete available test suite passes
verifier_hints: Capture the test command and exit code
Inspect the final diff for scope drift
